record.text: Application submitted for Backend Engineer Intern at Signal Works. Source: LinkedIn. JD link: https://jobs.example.com/signal/backend-intern. Resume: resume-backend-v3.pdf.

Recruiter reply from Maya at Cedar Systems: thanks for applying to Full Stack Engineer. Next steps are a short call; please send availability by May 18, 2026. Contact: Maya Patel <maya@cedar.example>.
Online assessment reminder: your OA for Machine Learning Platform Intern at Helios Data is due 2026-05-20. Use resume-ml-v4.pdf and the Handshake job post.
Your OA for Product Engineer Intern at Atlas Robotics is due May 21, 2026 at 5 PM PT. Reply after completion so we can confirm the interview window.
We would like to schedule a phone screen for the ML Intern role at Northstar AI on May 22, 2026. Please send availability.
Technical screen invitation for Platform Engineer at Orbit Labs. Interview date: 2026-05-24. Recruiter: Sam Lee <sam@orbit.example>.
Congratulations, the team is preparing an offer for Software Engineer Intern at Cobalt Health. Attached are offer details and salary: $48/hr.
Thank you for your time. You were not selected for the Data Engineer Intern role at Lumen Systems and we are not moving forward.
Maybe this is for either the platform role or the product role. The sender says next steps but gives no company proof.
URGENT remote job offer. Pay a processing fee today to unlock the role and receive your interview link.
Weekly product newsletter: new features, webinar invite, unsubscribe here, and a limited-time discount.
Your password reset security code is 123456. This account notification is not related to a job application.
Shipping notification: your delivery is arriving tomorrow. Track your package and view your invoice online.
Application submitted for ML Engineer Intern. Resume: resume-ml-projects-v4.pdf. Source: campus career fair. Skills include TypeScript, Python, machine learning systems, and review-gated automation.
Application submitted for AI Platform Intern. Source: LinkedIn. Job description link: https://jobs.example.com/vector/ai-platform. Location: Remote US. Salary: $40/hr - $50/hr.
